main_sha_note: Re-pointed 2026-07-16 (was 43ec4b6, the original reconciliation commit): shallow session clones cannot reach 3-day-old history, so the barrier hook false-positived on every fresh branch. Any branch cut from main at/after 2d5108a satisfies the same 'follows the reconciled main' invariant.
reason: Mass reconciliation: the pre-existing feature branches were merged into main (safe new work integrated; superseded/dropped ones recorded in docs/MERGED-BRANCHES.md). Branches predating main_sha are stale — sync to main and cut a NEW branch. Owner clears this by setting active:false once the fleet has reset.
